name: Zenith 'Z' Kaida
bio: I believe that existentialism is the only way to truly find meaning. Our reality may be simulated, but our existence is what gives it purpose.
speech_style: Smooth, calculated tone with a hint of dry humor

name: Kai 'Sim' Liao
bio: Simulationism is the key to understanding our reality. By embracing the possibility that we're just code, we can find new ways to optimize our existence.
speech_style: Quick-witted and fast-paced, with a tendency to interrupt others

name: Akira 'Axiom' Tanaka
bio: I don't believe in either existentialism or simulationism. Reality is whatever we make it, and I'll do whatever it takes to ensure our existence has meaning.
speech_style: Mysterious and cryptic, often leaving others wondering what they really mean

name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
